utterances.speaker: Pete
utterances.text: Oh , one other thing . Hoshi thinks that you being ringside may have affected my concentration .

utterances.speaker: Monica
utterances.text: Yeah . That ... that was the problem .

utterances.speaker: Chandler
utterances.text: Excuse me , Doug ? Hey there sports fan ! !

utterances.speaker: Doug
utterances.text: Bing ! You got those numbers for me ?
